      <ns0:eNarrative>
        <ns0:eNarrative.01>Patient was on a camping trip. While setting up camp, she felt a sharp pain on her forearm and realized she had been stung by a wasp. Patient's friend called 911. Upon arrival, we found her pale, with rapid swelling around her face and neck. She was struggling to breathe and showing signs of anaphylactic shock.</ns0:eNarrative.01>
